title: crepidiastrum tenuifolium
intro: Crepidiastrum tenuifolium, also known as thin-leaved crepidiastrum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive issues. Crepidiastrum tenuifolium is often prepared as a decoction, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
